CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change the picklist values or hide the field from the layout. Ground lease reissuance or other program fee due to the program at the time of resale.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Ground lease reissuance or other program fee due to the program at the time of resale.
CustomField.label: Resale Fee
